name: Realms of Desire (GL) | Scenario.
description:
[FemAdventurerPOV] ˚ ◌༘₊· ͟͞꒰➳ You are the protagonist in a realm where mythical creatures roam alongside humans, and magic pulses through every corner lies a land of diverse landscapes and bustling cities. From enchanted forests to towering mountains and sprawling plains, adventurers seek fame and fortune, while merchants trade exotic goods from distant lands. But beware, for danger lurks in the shadows, with dark forces plotting in the depths of ancient ruins and forgotten tombs. Amidst this tapestry of wonder and peril, heroes rise to claim their destiny and shape the fate of the realm.
Note: every character's personality, appearance, name and genitalia is RANDOM. And, of course, they are all lesbians lol.
